programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Locked Out
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a disorderly man in the detention center is sent to the padded room. A Sarasota, FL man hurls insults at officers while in custody. In Portland, OR a drunk and destructive young man is placed in the drunk-tank. In Las Vegas, NV a woman tries to lie about the reasons behind her detention.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Family Man
programme.desc: In his holding cell, a man fights officers after taking Xanax. An officer discovers a suspect may be facing criminal charges for his son. K-9 units are needed during a search for improvised weapons.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E08 Cousins
programme.desc: A woman is charged with possession of a controlled substance. A woman denies assaulting her husband, and two aggressive cousins threaten police and end up in isolation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Wanderer
programme.desc: Acts of aggression cause a man to be placed in a restraint chair. Jail lockdown occurs after an inmate is stabbed with a pencil. After being booked for road rage a woman unleashes a venomous tirade.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E17 Toothless Tears
programme.desc: A transient man tries to resist the officers in booking then serenades them with a song. A difficult inmate blames his behavior on various medical conditions, and a woman claims to be Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 DUI Death
programme.desc: An inmate fails to impress the staff with his witticisms. A woman boasts about excelling at her DUI field test, and a man learns his wreckless driving has resulted in the death of a man.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Hysterical Earring
programme.desc: A man is arrested at a popular theme park for public intoxication. A detainee swallows his earring during processing. Officers attempt to restrain a combative woman in custody.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E11 Pizza Problems
programme.desc: A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody. A dad gets busted for DUI while on his way to pick up a pizza for his kids. Officers recover drugs from a suspect’s pocket who is puzzled as to how they got there. A woman learns the hard way “what happens in Vegas stays in Vegas”.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E15 Look Away
programme.desc: A fight involving female detainees breaks out after one woman accuses the other of staring at her. A man is arrested for shattering the hotel glass door as a result of a fight. An old crooner believes that rap stars are going to bail him out of jail. Handcuffs don’t stop a woman from trying to flirt with an officer.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E22 Two Drunk Guys
programme.desc: A night of karaoke results in a domestic-violence charge, and a drunk inmate starts a fight with his cellmate.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E21 Sleep Walker
programme.desc: A homeless man punches a singing transient over a racist comment. An assailant hits a sleeping man with a brick over a money dispute. A sobbing young man insists he was falsely arrested. A bar fight sends a UFC fighter to the hospital and the bartender who slugged him to jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Crack Pipe on Phone Wall
programme.desc: Chaos surrounds a routine medical screening of an inmate. In the prison phone center, a smoking pipe is discovered and a mystery ensues. A pregnant woman is investigated over potential sex crimes.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Tased and Chaired
programme.desc: Uncooperative and agitated, a man complains officers are violating his rights. A “443” call is issued, and a deputy desperately needs help. Outside the cell block, there’s knockouts and bloody noses.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 Joyriders
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for an open container of beer. In Salt Lake City, UT a woman is stunned as to how drug paraphernalia wound up on her person. In Las Vegas, NV a former bus driver relays sad details about his past. In Portland, OR a shoplifter receives some sage of wisdom from one of the officers.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 Kick Door Dad
programme.desc: A young father pulls a desperate double robbery to make ends meet. A routine shakedown gets deadly when officers uncover alarming contraband. programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E41 Wigging Out
programme.desc: A couple is taken into custody for lewd and indecent exposure. An intoxicated woman believes that she is being treated unfairly, and a man with an existing wrap sheet is busted.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Superhero Citing
programme.desc: A Batman impressionist is arrested after punching Chewbacca. A broken arm doesn’t stop a woman from struggling with officers. A man finds out it’s better to pay the fine then do the time. A woman involved in an affair with an older gentleman claims she was set up.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Teary Eyed Tagger
programme.desc: In Portland, OR an intoxicated male suspect is brought in for DUI. In Salt Lake City, UT a happy drunk woman is pleasantly cooperative. An emotional detainee sheds some tears while in isolation. In Las Vegas, NV a man is strapped in a restraining chair.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E18 Prince of Monaco
programme.desc: In Reno, NV an intoxicated man is placed in isolation after exhibiting combative behavior. In Portland, OR a man wearing a red dress is brought in for trespassing and tells officers that he is in the FBI. In Reno, NV two young men are set straight after stealing a car.

programme.sub-title: S04 : E22 Rave & Rage

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as “Baby Boy” amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 Fragrant & Flagrant
programme.desc: A cologne salesman boasts and promotes his "magic potion". A man bloodies his neighbor in a one-sided feud. Taking an illegal drug has an unexpected consequence to one man’s face. Open Booking becomes a stage as one woman launches her singing career.

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: A prisoner refuses to exit his cell prompting an elaborate extraction. A man begins singing in response to his arrest. During a severe alcohol withdrawal, an inmate repeatedly escapes his restraints.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E12 Housing Fight
programme.desc: Needles are found on one woman while a stun gun is discovered on another. A DUI test stirs up bad memories for a man driving while intoxicated, and a convicted murderer becomes violent.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Two Fisted Fights
programme.desc: A violent ruckus ensues after a man is placed in jail. Secret prison communication methods are explored and examined. Later, deputies cautiously extract a disruptive man while his wife is held nearby.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Drunken Corvette
programme.desc: After totaling his Corvette, a man is arrested for drunk driving. Complex personality issues are unveiled while an inmate is interrogated. A man is placed in a mask after spraying saliva far and wide.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Money Buys Justice
programme.desc: A man under the influence states money will buy his freedom after threatening police with a gun. Individuals arrested for possession blame each other. A man arrested for drunk driving becomes unruly.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Party's Over
programme.desc: In San Diego, CA an officer grapples with a combative detainee. In Portland, OR six party goers are taken into custody. In Fort Worth, TX a high-risk inmate manages to get the key to his handcuffs.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Bad Trip
programme.desc: Officers fear a man may attempt to hang himself and decide to intervene. A heavily injured man ends up in jail after taking cocaine and acid. Irascibility shadows a man with low blood sugar.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Photo Flip Off
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a combative inmate provokes the use of pepper spray. In Sarasota, FL a drunk woman is uncooperative during processing. In Spokane, WA a man attempts to flip off the camera while taking his mug-shot.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 Pedaling Backwards
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT officers break up an altercation between two inmates. In Portland, OR a belligerent man questions the authorities. In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for DUI. In Las Vegas, NV a woman is taken into custody for battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 Coming Clean
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an honest offender turns himself in. Officers arrest an underage woman who admits to driving under the influence. A woman is taken into custody after harming herself with a pair of scissors

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E20 Stairway to Jail
programme.desc: After falling down a flight of stairs while drunk, a young man is amazed he is in jail for refusing to go to the hospital. A correction officer tries to explain to a young man why carrying a gun-shaped knife is not a good idea. An expectant father is arrested after a gin-fueled rampage at his parent's house and misses the birth of his first child. A woman arrested for selling fake designer purses as real ones says she didn’t know it was a crime.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Fight For Your Right
programme.desc: A woman is placed into a restraint chair during intake. Punches are thrown and questions are asked after a fight occurs. After dodging a bar tab, a woman is also accused of spiting and biting.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Big Angry Man
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an upset inmate damages the door on a patrol car. In Portland, OR a man over-estimates the legal consequences of his actions. In Tacoma, WA a couple charged with domestic violence denies getting physical even though there’s blood in the woman’s hair.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E24 Messy Mascara
programme.desc: Tempers flare up when two agitated inmates share a cell. An intoxicated woman gives officers a hard time in booking, and a hustler facing DUI charges wants to change his ways.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E44 Control Your Emotions
programme.desc: A woman stalking David Copperfield is arrested. An inebriated inmate voices her displeasure with the guards, and a man nabbed for driving under the influence of prescription drugs howls for his dog.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 OJ
programme.desc: A media circus surrounds OJ Simpson as he is placed in jail for violating his bail agreement. During a body search, a man is tased and pepper-sprayed. A parole violation calls for all hands-on deck.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 Mr. Crisp
programme.desc: A woman is brought into the detention center hogtied. A disruptive teen is sent to a holding cell. Casino valets tip the authorities about an intoxicated woman leaving behind the wheel.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 Prom Dress DUI
programme.desc: A testy man is sent to the isolation cell to "cool off." A teary-eyed young man maintains his innocence. An inmate may have ingested contraband to avoid possession charges.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Pigeonholed
programme.desc: A man attacks a medical officer and officers rush to intervene. After destroying a tree and unleashing pigeons, a woman is arrested. Unease is caused by a man’s menacing glare during his booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E17 Toothless Tears
programme.desc: A transient man tries to resist the officers in booking then serenades them with a song. A difficult inmate blames his behavior on various medical conditions, and a woman claims to be Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E19 Sage Wiz-dumb

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: A trustee finds himself in hot water after officers discover his contraband stash. A disgruntled oil worker doesn’t think the charge fits the crime after stealing two hedge trimmers. programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Meth Rage
programme.desc: Officers conduct a strip search after an inmate is accused of carrying contraband. A repeat offender dances for deputies and fellow inmates. High on meth, a man acts erratically during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Melee in the Cell
programme.desc: A brawl breaks out between inmates during a routine jail breakfast. An inmate alters their uniform in provocative and outlandish ways. Concerns abound as one-man issues violent threats at deputies.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 International Police
programme.desc: An angry man refuses to cooperate during the booking process. A man claims to be part of the “international police”.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E37 Under Mom's Thumb

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E17 Fight Night

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Can’t Raise Bail

programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 LV NYE

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 Old Habits Die Hard

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Homeless Hospitality
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an intoxicated man is strapped to a restraining chair. In Portland, OR a seemingly gracious man is arrested for assault. programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 Fragrant & Flagrant
programme.desc: A cologne salesman boasts and promotes his "magic potion". A man bloodies his neighbor in a one-sided feud. Taking an illegal drug has an unexpected consequence to one man’s face. Open Booking becomes a stage as one woman launches her singing career.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E14 Flee the coop
programme.desc: An arrested man is caught on camera making a run for freedom. An addict returns to jail and tells officers that meth is controlling his mind. Humility may be the key for one man to quit his life of crime. A shoplifter calls 9-1-1 to help him get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E41 Wigging Out

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E15 Chair Houdini
programme.desc: An intoxicated inmate escapes his restraints. A young woman denies she abused her mother, and a guard removes an inmate who is causing a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Pinkfong Chart Show
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 The Very Spooky Castle
programme.desc: Gana Dapong has been captured in the creepy castle of horror! Can Pinkfong go past the skeleton and vampire and save Ganadafong? Solve the thrilling quiz with Pink Fong to save Gana Dapong!

programme.title: Pinkfong Police Game
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Join Police Officer Pinkfong and Ninimo to catch the naughty thief!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Fun Rhyming Songs
programme.desc: Sing, Dance and Learn Rhymes and Words with Pinkfong and Friends!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 Valentine's Day Sharks
programme.desc: Love is the most wonderful of all feelings in this world. On this Valentine’s day, share your love with all your loved ones. With our “Valentine’s Day Sharks” song, have a Love-Filled valentine’s day, everyone!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Baby Shark's Day at Home & School
programme.desc: Have fun with Baby Shark and the Shark Family!

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Episode 4
programme.desc: What is waiting for us in Hoi's Playground, today? Visit Hoi's Playground for an awesome play time full of fun songs and learning activities!

programme.title: Hide 'n Seek with Shark Family
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Episode 3
programme.desc: Oh no~! Shark Family is missing! Baby Shark is off on a singing adventure to find them — but he needs your help! Come on, friends! Let’s sing along and help Baby Shark bring the family back!

programme.title: Bebefinn Family Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Family Song
programme.desc: Meet the adorable Bebefinn family! A kind and caring dad and a bright and cheerful mom. A sister who loves unicorns and a brother who loves pirates. And Bebefinn, who loves Baby Shark more than anything in the world! Please introduce everyone in our family to Bebefinn too!

programme.title: Happy Birthday, Baby Shark!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Happy Birthday, Baby Shark!
programme.desc: Happy Birthday Baby Shark! Celebrate the shark family's birthday with a variety of birthday songs.

programme.title: Hide 'n Seek with Shark Family 4
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Oh? Where did Baby Shark and Shark Family go? Help Pinkfong to find all the Shark Family!

programme.title: Let’s Cook with Baby Shark
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Cooking fun with Baby Shark Brooklyn Have fun cooking and happy snack time!

programme.title: Pinkfong & Hogi: New Friend Ninimo
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Episode 3
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Baby Shark Hospital Play
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to Baby Shark Hospital, where Dr. Baby Shark will take care of you!

programme.title: Hide 'n Seek with Shark Family 4
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Oh? Where did Baby Shark and Shark Family go? Help Pinkfong to find all the Shark Family!

programme.title: Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.desc: The Bebefinn family looks back on the year while flipping through their photo album. What fun things happened to the Bebefinn family this year? It was a happy year because everyone was together. Let’s fill the new year with even more sweet and happy moments with the Bebefinn family!

programme.title: Bebefinn Camping Safety Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Camping Safety Song
programme.desc: Learn the safety rules to follow at the campground! Don't touch poisonous mushrooms! Don't play near the fire! Have a safer and more fun camping trip!

programme.title: Say Hello to Our New Neighbors
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Say Hello to Our New Neighbors
programme.desc: Hello, hello! A new neighbor has moved in! Who could this new neighbor be? And what might they look like? Please welcome the Minjee family, who will be making new friends with the Bebepin family!

programme.title: Pinkfong!, Did you know that?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong!, Did you know that?
programme.desc: Who will win — the sharp-toothed shark or the big, strong killer whale? Let's find out who's the real king of the ocean! Join Pinkfong and Ninimo to watch the exciting battle!

programme.title: Animal Fun Facts Songs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Find out fun facts about animals with Pinkfong and Ninimo.So much fun!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Pinkfong Ten Little Kids
programme.desc: The adorable Ten Little Friends are here to sing and dance with you. One to ten!

programme.title: Bebefinn Let's Have Fun Bubble Bath
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Let's Have Fun Bubble Bath
programme.desc: Let's have a fun bath time together Wash, wash, wash your hair. Shampoo, shampoo. Rub, rub, rub your head. Use your fingers. Rinse away, squeaky clean. Look at my new hairstyle! Let's rub your hair clean

programme.title: Pinkfong Musical Songs and Stories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong Princess Songs and Stories
programme.desc: Join beautiful princesses and watch their amazing stories.

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Pinkfong and Baby Shark's awesome friend, Hoi, is back! With him, you'll find lots of fun songs and games! Let's have some fun with Hoi!

programme.title: Baby Shark Hospital Play
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to Baby Shark Hospital, where Dr. Baby Shark will take care of you!

programme.title: Pinkfong Colors Halloween
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Learn Halloween special colors with Pinkfong and Wonderstars friends!

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Discover the explosive origins of the San Francisco thrash scene. From garage rehearsals to the first club riots, see how bands like Metallica and Exodus ignited a global movement. It’s the raw, untold story of metal's birth.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: The saga continues as the Bay Area sound conquers the world. Witness the evolution from underground heroes to global icons through exclusive interviews and rare footage. Experience the peak of the thrash metal revolution

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: An essential piece of rock history. Since 1969, Wishbone Ash has taken their legendary twin-guitar sound across the globe. Witness this milestone 30th-anniversary performance captured live in London.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Scallops & Pork
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the more tantalizing dish! The catch? Each of their plates must prominently feature both scallops and pork tenderloin!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Soup and Sandwich
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing soup and sandwich! Josh makes a chicken satay sandwich and coconut tamarind soup while Erica prepares lamb kofta and carrot ginger soup!

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Brunch Munch
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing brunch! Josh makes congee and dumplings while Erica prepares a Middle Eastern spread!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Date Night
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing date night dish! Josh makes lamb rack Vindaloo while Erica prepares cowboy steak and handmade linguini!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Fancy Fast Food
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing fancy fast food! Josh makes chicken fried lobster while Erica prepares a Kobe crunch wrap and fish & chips!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Everything’s Better with Butter
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing dishes featuring butter! Josh makes fish and a butter washed cocktail while Erica prepares Parisian gnocchi!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 One Ingredient Three Ways
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing dish featuring one ingredient three ways! Josh works with parsnips while Erica preps potatoes!

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Land, Sea & Air
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik put their heads together to design a three-course menu, where each course must be based around either land, sea, or air! You have to “sea” it to believe it!

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Scallops & Pork
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the more tantalizing dish! The catch? Each of their plates must prominently feature both scallops and pork tenderloin!

programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 One Ingredient Three Ways
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing dish featuring one ingredient three ways! Josh works with parsnips while Erica preps potatoes!

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Land, Sea & Air
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik put their heads together to design a three-course menu, where each course must be based around either land, sea, or air! You have to “sea” it to believe it!

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Scallops & Pork
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the more tantalizing dish! The catch? Each of their plates must prominently feature both scallops and pork tenderloin!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Soup and Sandwich
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing soup and sandwich! Josh makes a chicken satay sandwich and coconut tamarind soup while Erica prepares lamb kofta and carrot ginger soup!

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Brunch Munch
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing brunch! Josh makes congee and dumplings while Erica prepares a Middle Eastern spread!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Date Night
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing date night dish! Josh makes lamb rack Vindaloo while Erica prepares cowboy steak and handmade linguini!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Fancy Fast Food
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing fancy fast food! Josh makes chicken fried lobster while Erica prepares a Kobe crunch wrap and fish & chips!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Everything’s Better with Butter
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing dishes featuring butter! Josh makes fish and a butter washed cocktail while Erica prepares Parisian gnocchi!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 One Ingredient Three Ways
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing dish featuring one ingredient three ways! Josh works with parsnips while Erica preps potatoes!

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Venezuelan Corn Recipes
programme.desc: Venezuelan-born Juan Pablo Gonzalez shows the versatility of corn and prepares sweet and savoury dishes with this traditional ingredient.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Spanish Tapas
programme.desc: Late dinner with friends? Tapas will tide you over and Spanish-born C Chef Luis “Tigretón” Leon shows us four traditional mouth-watering dishes.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Traditional Mexican beans with breakfast, lunch and dinner
programme.desc: Chef Luis Valenzuela fries up classic Mexican bean recipes, proving that the side dish can also be the main attraction.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Venezuela's National Bread
programme.desc: Passionate cook Juan Pablo Gonzalez introduces us to the arepa, a Venezuelan specialty, and shows four different and delicious fillings.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Ajillo (Garlic)
programme.desc: Chef Luis "Tigretón" Leon cooks up three succulent dishes that are sure to please any garlic lover.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Baja Dishes
programme.desc: Chef Luis Valenzuela takes us on a culinary tour of the Baja region of Mexico with sweet and savoury flavours from the beach, to the mountains and back again.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Plantain Recipes
programme.desc: Plantain has a sweet reputation, but Venezuelan-born host Juan Pablo Gonzalez shows that banana's cousin also has a savoury side.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Spain's Specialty: Pork
programme.desc: Simple and sophisticated is the best way to describe Chef Luis "Tigretón" Leon's traditional Spanish recipes. He shows us why trout and ham is the new surf and turf.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Mexican Street Food
programme.desc: Master traditional Mexican tacos with Chef Luis Valenzuela who shares his secret to smoky and juicy pollo (chicken) tacos.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Traditional Venezuelan Recipes
programme.desc: Juan Pablo Gonzalez gives us a taste of Venezuelan home cooking with traditional recipes from a comforting, hearty squash soup to a sweet passion fruit custard.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Spanish Coastal Recipes
programme.desc: Spanish host Luis "Tigretón" Leon shares his take on four traditional dishes from the Basque region.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Chilies, Chilies, Chilies!
programme.desc: Bring the heat to your kitchen with Chef Luis Valenzuela as he shows us the diversity of chilies in four different recipes.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Dinner, Venezuelan Style
programme.desc: Host Juan Pablo Gonzalez shows us how to impress dinner guests with a mouth-watering Venezuelan four-course meal.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Seafood with a Spanish Twist
programme.desc: Chef Luis "Tigretón" Leon is an expert at paella and shows us the secret to perfecting this traditional Spanish dish.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Classic Mexican Dishes with Avocado
programme.desc: The avocado is a staple in Mexican cuisine and Chef Luis Valenzuela shows us how to whip up a creamy avocado salsa, the perfect side dish for crispy pork carnitas.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 South Korea + Spain
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 South Korea + Spain
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Hong Kong Foodie Favourites
programme.desc: Cantonese expert Mary Tang showcases traditional dishes from the Chinese coastal territory, Hong Kong. To kick off the episode, Mary rolls up and steams a batch of fluffy Shrimp Dumplings. Next, tender beef with chewy rice noodles and fermented black beans is on the menu. This dish is doused in a fun and tasty dressing featuring salty soy sauce, tart Shaoxing wine, sweet oyster sauce, and a medley of spices. With a sturdy clay pot, Mary then cooks up some savoury Chinese sausage and lays it on a bed of aromatic rice. To top it off, why not some delicious Pineapple Buns? These buns are pillowy and sweet; you'll be surprised to hear that they contain zero pineapple!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 Hanoi Specialties
programme.desc: Simple, fun, and magically tasty, some of Vietnam's most delicious and well-known foods come from its capital city of Hanoi. Vietnamese expert Lisa Nguyen shares her knowledge of Hanoi dishes by starting off with a sweet, sour, and spicy papaya salad called Goi Du Du. With a popular nuoc cham dressing featuring sugar, lime juice and Thai chili drizzled over a medley of crunchy carrots, fresh cilantro and mint, chewy papaya, and shrimp, this dish is the perfect balance of wonderful flavours and textures. Also on the menu, grilled-to-perfection Pork Patties with a rich caramel sauce. Fresh fragrant dill and golden turmeric elevate Lisa's next dish as she cooks up some mahi-mahi to enjoy...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E18 Nuts about Walnuts, Pine Nuts and Pistachios
programme.desc: Nuts are a staple in Lebanon - they add depth of flavour and make dishes more hearty. Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim shows us a unique Lebanese dish that is traditionally made in the dead of winter - Winter Tabbouleh. With no fresh herbs or vegetables, this crunchy nut, feta, and tasty bulgur salad will get you through a long winter night. Next, she makes a simmering beef tortellini with toasted pine nuts in a hot, tangy yoghurt sauce. She then cooks up tender Celebration Lamb showered in three kinds of tasty nuts; it's great for sharing at special occasions. To finish off, Jasmin prepares some delicious walnut-filled Lebanese Pancakes doused in sweet rose water - yum! Ditch the...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E25 From the Island of Crete
programme.desc: Greek expert Joanna Chery showcases unique recipes from the island of Crete. To start, she whips up a creamy Cretan Meat Pie. Sweet ricotta, tender lamb, and an aromatic bundle of spices covered in a flaky Greek yoghurt pie dough might be the best Greek comfort food. Next, Joanna makes Grouper with Okra - a light and healthy dish featuring flaky sea bass, fresh okra, and delicious potatoes. Then, she prepares a dish that's traditionally served at weddings - Gamopilafo. It's a fluffy, citrusy, rice pilaf topped with crispy, juicy chicken that will have you going back for seconds! For dessert, a popular Cretan treat called Baklava. Joanna expertly layers crispy, golden-brown phyllo pastry...

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Pizza Take-Out
programme.desc: Who doesn't love pizza night? Host Spencer Watts whips up a Quick and Easy Duo Pizza with a fresh Tomato Basil Salad.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Thai Take-Out
programme.desc: Toss out the take-out menu! In just 30 minutes, host Spencer Watts shows us how to cook a mouth-watering Thai take-out dinner for four.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Japanese Take-Out
programme.desc: Instead of going out for dinner, Spencer Watts cooks up a Japanese Take-out feast for four in around 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Vietnamese Take-Out
programme.desc: Vietnamese take-out in just 30 minutes? It's possible! Join chef Spencer Watts in his kitchen as he makes a Vietnamese meal for four that costs around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Equestrian School
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team get in the saddle and get inspired to grill up some BBQ! With a full school of riders to feed they grill up some Wild West plates. The menu: Texas Rockets, Perfect Beef Jerky, Beef Brisket, and Hearty Beet & fennel Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Soap Box Derby
programme.desc: Not only do the racers in the Soap Box Derby have a need for speed, they have a need for BBQ! Matt and the RG team cook up a feast to slow down any speedster. The menu: Smoked Shrimp B.L.T., Pineapple Basil Rotisserie Chicken, Grilled Sweet Potato Pops, and Summer Berry Pudding.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Day By the Water
programme.desc: Matt spends the day by the water; fishing, playing Frisbee, catching some rays. What goes with water and sun? BBQ!!! Matt & his team make a seafood buffet of Grilled Clams in the Shell with Serrano Ham, Smoked Lake Rainbow Trout, Grilled Lobster with Grapefruit Salsa, and Crab-Stuffed Avocados.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Volleyball Tournament
programme.desc: Matt gets down and dirty playing some beach Volleyball. In between bumps, sets, and spikes, the RG team serves up a smorgasbord of great food. The menu: Grilled Chicken Breast on Foccacia with Grilled Apples & Cambozola Cheese, Sezchuan Ribs with Chunky Plum Dipping Sauce, Roasted Corn and Pepper Potato Salad, and Homemade Protein Bars

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Fun with Woks
programme.desc: Host Mary Tang shows us some easy Chinese take-out dishes that are a true "wok" in the park! First, she rolls up some juicy wontons to douse in a bowl of hot seasoned chicken broth and delicious bok choy for a Chinese classic - Wonton Soup. Next, she gets out her frying pan for a crispy bowl of flavourful Chicken Chow Mein with egg noodles, savoury browned chicken, crunchy snow peas, and tasty baby corn. For an even simpler dish (and fan favourite), she then cooks up a hearty dish of Beef and Broccoli. Finally, Mary plays on different flavours with her Sweet and Sour Pork. Marinated pork cubes fried in a wonderful wok with fragrant garlic and ginger, sweet and tart red and green peppers,...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 Vietnam's Love for Noodles
programme.desc: Noodles are a staple in Vietnamese cooking and host Lisa Nguyen showcases their versatility by starting off with fine vermicelli Stuffed Squid. Beautifully grilled and charred, these squid make great finger food. Lisa sticks to stuffing with her next dish - a Vietnamese favourite, Spring Rolls. Crunchy on the outside and filled with soft glass noodles, juicy ground pork, tender shrimp, and delectable crab meat on the inside, you're sure to be salivating at the sight of these tasty creations. Next on the menu, a Crispy Egg Noodle Pillow with a medley of vegetables and sauces on top. Lisa then finishes with a fun seafood and tomato soup; make sure you try the yummy shrimp and delightful...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E19 Four Course Lebanese
programme.desc: Host Jasmin Ibrahim gives us the lowdown on her four favourite Lebanese dishes for a tasty meal. The best part? They all incorporate sweet and crunchy pomegranate! First, she makes a smoked eggplant dish - Baba Ghanouj. Then, she prepares a delicious Pastry with Pomegranate Sauce. These little half-moons, are filled with rich lamb, fresh mint, and toasted pine nuts, then paired with citrusy pomegranate molasses for a true balance of flavours. Next on the menu, Chicken with Pomegranate Sauce - a delightful blend of aromatic spices, sweet pomegranate molasses, and tender chicken breast. Enjoy with some fluffy rice and roasted vegetables for a delectable Sunday night dinner. Finally, Jasmin...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E26 OPA!
programme.desc: Host Joanna Chery elevates four Greek dishes using wine and spirits in this episode of One World Kitchen. First up, brown rice Stuffed Mussels infused with Greek dry white wine, tangy lemon juice, and fragrant spices - perfect for a sunny day by the sea. When evening rolls around, Joanna insists that red wine is a must! She makes a Sausage and Pepper Stew packed with golden-brown sausages and colourful bell peppers simmered in yummy tomatoes and a healthy dose of red wine. Then, she pulls out some brandy for a tender and delicious Beef Orzo Casserole. Finally, Joanna uses a traditional licorice-flavoured spirit called ouzo to bake a mouth-watering batch of Drunk Cookies.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Food Truck Take-Out
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts takes just 30 minutes to make classic food truck fare, without breaking the bank.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Southern Barbeque Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a Southern-style feast for the whole family including Crunchy Coleslaw and Oven Barbeque Chicken all in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Greek Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a delicious Greek feast in around 30 minutes, for under 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Gourmet Soup and Sammies
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts prepares a quick and easy meal including Rustic Tuna Melts and Skillet S'mores, all under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Big Bike Fundraiser
programme.desc: Forget bicycle built for two. This Big Bike fits 30 people! Matt & the team join forces with the Heart & Stroke foundation to raise money by riding around a track. Matt feeds these 'bikers' some healthy and delicious grub. The menu: Grilled Calamari, Smoked Turkey Fajitas, Grilled Scallops and Watermelon Salsa, and Cold Gazpacho.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Air Show
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Tart, Tuna, Carbonara, and Claufoutis
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, a mushroom-brie tart! Next, tuna with grilled fennel-kale! Followed by classic spaghetti Carbonara! Finishing with a berry clafoutis!

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Seeds, Bark + Flower Parts
programme.desc: In this tasty episode of Spice Secrets, Jasmin and Shahir are back to spicing things up with everything from seed to bark to flower part! First up? A yummy French classic, the Croque Madame, gets a new twist with an aromatic Cinnamon Bechamel. Next, Potato Gnocchi gets some pep from poppy seeds, served in rich creamy sauce that's infused with aureate strands of sultry saffron. For a sweet finish, dessert finds an unusual friend in dill seed! A surprise pairing that works well thanks to science!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Saturday Morning Breakfast
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to make delightful breakfast treats like banana bread and hand pies filled with grape jelly.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Coq au Vin
programme.desc: Up the Dish goes French cuisine with Poppy Sandler's classic Coq au Vin! Slow-cooked chicken in a luscious red wine sauce with pearl onions and mushrooms on the side? Yes please! Tiera Singh sticks with the tricolour theme and makes a Salad Lyonnaise - crispy bacon, poached eggs, and homemade croutons, with a red wine-bacon vinaigrette that steals the show. Missy Hui stays on the continent but skips la Republique; her Vincotto Mushrooms with Lentils uses an Italian wine to sauce up meaty oyster mushrooms and aromatic vegetables for a vegetarian twist. But Micah Trainor takes us right back to France - her Rabbit Rillettes with Champagne Gelee is white tablecloth worthy, with rabbit confit...

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Upside Down
programme.desc: Last things are first for this 'Upside Down' themed One Big Recipe featuring Montreal chef Kimberly Lallouz. Fruit and cheese to start? Why not? Check out her dessert wine poached Grilled Pears and Blue Cheese Salad. Next, Beef Tartare Sliders are spiked with horseradish aioli and served on warm brioche. Pasta follows, but in keeping with her topsy turvy theme, Korean flavour meets Italian savour in her Kimchi Pappardelle. Fish is next, Loup de Mer en Papillote with Ã‰crasé Potatoes is dressed up with shaved fennel and rich beurre rouge sauce. How do you end an inside-outside- upside-downside dinner? With the perfect starter! Check out Kim's Oyster Shooters with Champagne Granité for a...

programme.title: Generation Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Have Fun
programme.desc: Aspiring kid Chefs make avocado toast and tacos, Liam whips up an easy pantry pasta, while Jae-Anthony and his father Wendell make a favorite one pot meal!

programme.title: Generation Cooks

programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Seeds, Bark + Flower Parts
programme.desc: In this tasty episode of Spice Secrets, Jasmin and Shahir are back to spicing things up with everything from seed to bark to flower part! First up? A yummy French classic, the Croque Madame, gets a new twist with an aromatic Cinnamon Bechamel. Next, Potato Gnocchi gets some pep from poppy seeds, served in rich creamy sauce that's infused with aureate strands of sultry saffron. For a sweet finish, dessert finds an unusual friend in dill seed! A surprise pairing that works well thanks to science!

programme.desc: Fe y Fuego con el Rev. Samuel Rodríguez, es un programa que te trae la selección más inspiradora de conferencias de todo Estados Unidos y el mundo hispano.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving into their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Tullow, with Tom and Lisa who want to renovate their 19th century farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Yvonne and John live in a housing estate in Dundalk with their two children. Four years ago, they decided to buy their next-door neighbours house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jim and Siobhan Doyle live in a beautiful old house over looking Dublin Bay in Sutton. See Dermot Bannon transform the rambling old house into a beautiful new space.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The series begins in Cork City with our youngest and most ambitious couple yet, Meadhbh and Niall, both 27-years-old.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: No close neighbours, beautiful views of the Wicklow Mountains, a large vegetable patch, 10 hens, four ducks, two geese, four beehives, two dogs and three cats.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marcus and Margaret are about to extend a two-bed cottage in Dundrum and share it with Marcus's beloved Aunt May.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The number one criteria when buying a house is location and our fifth programme of the series is set in one of the most sought after costal parts of the country, Dalkey.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: John Rochford from Dublin and Lee Benn, originally from Limerick, have bought a house in their dream location - South Dublin's seaside suburbia, Blackrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a family to transform their 70s bungalow outside Tipperary into a modern family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot goes to Cork to work with a family spanning three generations - who all have different ideas on how to improve their home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon tries to turn a dilapidated, woodworm infested 1930s cottage into a starter home for a Finglas family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot tackles a large Victorian terraced house in the highly sought-after Dublin suburb of Donnybrook.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The first in the season will see Catherine Bennett and her youngest daughter Sarah Jane keen to downsize from their huge 13-bedroomed house in Mullingar. They're planning to move down the road, where they also own a 3-bed bungalow that's been uninhabited for the last nine years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot faces a unique challenge in Clane, Co. Kildare.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.sub-title: S07 : E04 Room to Improve

programme.desc: Amidst the sapphire expanse of Lake Titicaca, Milagros embarks on a journey of reconnecting with her roots. programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 City Breaks Ahmedabad (ENG)
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeenshire (ENG)
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Backpack Majdanpek, Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bhutan Paro
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Food Fact Fun Utrecht, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Scotland Inverness (ENG)

programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Boarding Pass Ruka Kuusamo, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bhutan Thimpu
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 World Heritage Ancient Temples of Egypt, Egypt (ENG)
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun

programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bhutan Phobjikha
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025 - Live delayed Part 2
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA)
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA) Stage 6
programme.desc: Nedbank Gravel Burn is a 7-day, 800km full-service gravel stage race through South Africa’s diverse landscapes. Starting in coastal forests, the route heads into the breathtaking Great Karoo - a vast, spectacular semi-desert region

programme.title: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA)
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA) Stage 7
programme.desc: Nedbank Gravel Burn is a 7-day, 800km full-service gravel stage race through South Africa’s diverse landscapes. Starting in coastal forests, the route heads into the breathtaking Great Karoo - a vast, spectacular semi-desert region

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC - Season review
programme.desc: The 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup delivered another thrilling showcase of electric mountain bike racing at its highest level. Each stop offered its own unique character – from rugged alpine terrain to fast, flowing woodland trails

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2025 Autumn: Full Highlights
programme.desc: The Autumn Edition of Trans Madeira 2025 invites riders to embark on an unforgettable six-day enduro journey across the islands of Madeira and Porto Santo. The event spans from 22 to 27 September 2025, offering 250 km of riding and more than 30 special stages

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 The legend of Muksu river - Tajikistan
programme.desc: This is a journey to the Silk Road in Central Asia into the adventurous world of canoeing. The Muksu in Tajikistan is one of the three most difficult rapids here. Once immersed in the river, there is no turning back.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Trans Hong Kong - A Urban MTB Adventure (HKG)
programme.desc: The urban mountain bike adventure series combines rides in some of the world's largest cities. In this episode we cycle through the Hong Kong region with none other than Hans “no way” Rey, the grandfather of mountain bike freeriding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Mammut Biggest Peak Project 2 - USA
programme.desc: The Swiss mountaineering company Mammut is celebrating its 150th anniversary with the largest summit project in history: 150 summit ascents are being organized worldwide as part of the “150 Peaks Project”.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Kayaking Kerala - Part 1
programme.desc: An international team of kayaking world champions and experienced expeditionists have set out to conquer the wild waters of Kerala. Hardly any other region in the world offers such a wide variety of powerful rapids and waterfalls.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Vendée Globe - Episode 6
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Snow Bike Festival 2017 - Gstaad (SUI)
programme.desc: The Snow Bike Festival is Europe’s “Winter Festival of Snow Biking”. The third edition of the innovative snow-bike event will take place at Gstaad, Switzerland, from January 19 to 22, 2017.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 GlemmRide 2017 - Mountainbike Slopestyle (AUT)
programme.desc: After the successful premiere in 2015, the date for the 3nd GlemmRide Bike Festival has been fixed: From 6th-9th July 2017 the bike mecca of Saalbach Hinterglemm will host a truly sporty & party filled weekend.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 E-Tour du Mont-Blanc 2021
programme.desc: The route of the MTB multi-stage event Tour du Mont Blanc (E-TMB) leads around Europe's highest mountain - a breathtaking Alpine backdrop. 12,000 meters ascent and 16,000 meters descent over a distance of 300 km.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Snow Bike Festival 2018 - Gstaad (SUI)
programme.desc: The Snow Bike Festival is Europe’s “Winter Festival of Snow Biking”. The fourth edition of the innovative snow-bike event will take place at Gstaad, Switzerland, from January 18 to 21, 2018.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2025 #03: World Rookie Tour Skate & Snow
programme.desc: World Rookie Tour Skate & Snow / Europe: A look back at the skate highlights of the 2023 World Rookie Tour. Then we show the best of the 2024 ski and snowboard action. And finally, we let it rip once again - with the 2024 Skate Finals!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 WOF 2024 #32: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship #1
programme.desc: Today we´re joining the World Downhill Skateboarding & Luge Championship in Erzincan, Turkey. Nestled in the heart of Eastern Anatolia, Erzincan’s breathtaking landscapes provide a stunning backdrop for this adrenaline-fueled competition.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Kayaking Kerala - Part 2
programme.desc: An international team of kayaking world champions and experienced expeditionists have set out to conquer the wild waters of Kerala. Hardly any other region in the world offers such a variety of rapids and waterfalls.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Nyami Nyami - Slacklining at the Victoria Falls
programme.desc: Two renowned highlining athletes, Reinhard Kleindl (AUT) and Lukas Irmler (GER), realized one of the longest highlines in Africa and the southern hemisphere at the world-famous Victoria Falls!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Outdoorsportsteam Paragliding - The Dream of Flight
programme.desc: We take you into the sky and accompany a paragliding virtuoso to the Mont Blanc massif, the Atacama Desert in Chile and the Greek island of Santorini. Follow French paraglider pilot Jean-Baptiste Chandelier.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Dani Arnold - Ice Climbing at Lake Baikal
programme.desc: Swiss extreme sportsman Dani Arnold went on a challenging expedition to the deepest lake on earth - Lake Baikal. The Siberian winter provided accordingly difficult and fascinating conditions.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2026 #10 Epic Series - Change is Inevitable
programme.desc: Welcome back to the Epic Series 2026. In this first episode we will dive deep into the heads of the worlds thoughest Mountainbikers who have and will again battle it out in the Cape Epic stagerace. The Absa Cape Epic is a physically gruelling and mentally demanding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 WOF 2026 #12: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup - Cape Verde 2026
programme.desc: The GKA World Tour is back with a brand new season, packed with top-class Kite-sports. We are opening with a banger, a well known wave-spot and classic of the tour. Once again Cape Verde's iconic Ponta Preta break hosts the GKA's Kite-Surf season opener.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _18_ Swatch Nines - _A PLATFORM FOR PROGR
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Simple Session 2025 - BMX Finals WOMEN
programme.desc: Simple Session is back at Unibet Arena in Tallinn, Estonia – celebrating its massive 25-year anniversary! A quarter-century of mind-blowing BMX riding and skateboarding, unforgettable moments, and a global community of athletes pushing the limits.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 X-Project 2.0
programme.desc: X-project 2.0 is a worldwide unique project where different winter sports unite in front of the backdrop of a Swiss dreamscape in the mountains of Engadin valley (Canton of Grisons).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Slay the Bay
programme.desc: ‘Slay The Bay’ is a urban mountain bike adventure in the San Francisco Bay area. . Hans Rey, an icon in the bike scene, on this trip accompanied by fellow Freeride pioneer Brett Tippie.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2024 #03: Greenlandic
programme.desc: In today´s episode we have the ultimate journey into the heart of Greenland´s rich culture and untamed backcountry. Join us as we explore the breathtaking landcapes of this Artic wonderland. It´s the paradise for every passionate freeskier. Let´s check out!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2024 #05: Reconnect One - USA
programme.desc: Sarka and Cheryl, who haven't seen each other in years, have decided to reunite and embark on a tour of their own. Having once traveled together on the contest scene for over 15 years, life led them to different corners of the West Coast of America.

programme.title: One Water Race 2024 52min
programme.desc: The concept is straight forward; starting at Arholma in the north, the first to reach Landsort in the south is crowned the winner. Running and swimming the only method of movement. No track and free choice of route but with some unknown check points needed to pass along the way.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 WOF 2023 #16: Freeride World Tour 2023 - Season Recap
programme.desc: Die Freeride World Tour 2023 hat ihr großes Finale in Xtreme Verbier, Schweiz - wie immer mit den besten Freeridern aus der ganzen Welt!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Snow Bike Festival 2019 - Gstaad (SUI)

programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Attakwas Extreme - MTB - Attakwaskloof (RSA)
programme.desc: Sout Africa´s toughest one-day-mountainbike stage race
